title: BIC Kids Tropicolors 2 Colouring Pencils 12 Pack
features: Ideal for kids 5+, these colouring pencils come in a great range of colours and are sold as a pack of 12
A pigment-based lead makes the colours vibrant and intense, ideal for budding artists to create colourful pictures
A fun striped barrel adds an outstanding look, a perfect colouring companion for any child
A kid-friendly and reliable colouring pencil, thanks to the ultra-resistant 3.2mm lead
They're easy to sharpen, allowing kids to spend more time colouring and less time sharpening at home or in the classroom
